fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for selected rest foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for selected rest background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for selected hover foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for selected hover background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for selected active foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for selected active background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for selected disabled foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for selected disabled background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for unselected rest foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for unselected rest background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for unselected hover foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for unselected hover background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for unselected active foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for unselected active background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for unselected disabled foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tab component for unselected disabled background.

radius.$description: Approximation of md.comp.primary-navigation-tab.active-indicator.shape (3dp top corners only): corner.full rounds all corners of the 3px bar; exact top-only rounding would need dedicated component CSS support.
